source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit shown in figure, when relay K1 is operating, K2 stops working; when relay K2 is operating, K1 stops working. (Assuming the internal resistance of the relay is 100Ω, and the operating current is 100mA.) If K2 needs to operate, the voltage and polarity that should be applied to terminals A and B are:
